headline: BMO Trims IBM Target on Soft Growth, Wedbush Sees AI Tailwinds
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is included among the 10 Best May Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 23, BMO Capital Markets lowered its price recommendation on International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) to $270 from $290. It reiterated a Market Perform rating. The analyst said Q1 software organic growth came in below expectations, even with […]
